message:
feat(core): add tiered scrollback bridge methods and bulk operations (ft-2p9cb.3.3.2)

ingest_bulk, segments_for_pane, tier_bytes, total_lines,
evict_hot_to_target, oldest_hot_segment/age, active_pane_ids,
cold_utilization, plus 10 unit tests.
